name: xau_london_range_expansion_m5
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M5, after an Asia-session (00:00-06:00 UTC) accumulation range sized 0.5-2.0x ATR, a London-session (07:00-11:00 UTC) close beyond the range by >=0.5 ATR with body >=1.0 ATR yields positive expectancy via continuation.

entry_rules.long: close > range_high + 0.5*ATR14 AND body >= 1.0*ATR14 during trade window
entry_rules.short: close < range_low - 0.5*ATR14 AND body >= 1.0*ATR14 during trade window

regime_filter.rationale: Expansion plays require baseline volatility; dead days produce fakeouts.

exit_rules.tp: 2.0 * ATR(14) or opposite range extreme + 1x ATR, whichever closer

falsification_criteria: Zero trades on first IS bar (indicates session/TZ bug) OR PF<1.3 OR range-filter rejects >90% of days.
